title: Fabulously Survivalized
description: Various mods fit in a small package to add some QoL features, and still *feel* vanilla
body:
Survival Additions is a modpack for the latest version of Minecraft, that is based on Fabulously Optimized and designed for fun gameplay that is vanilla enough, but *different than the usual Vanilla+ modpacks*

Although not quite "Vanilla", worlds are interchangeable between the modpack and Vanilla. It is a pack almost guaranteed to boost your FPS! # List of features: - Treechop/Treeharvest - Villager trade cycling - Shaders - Ingame Ressource pack downloader - ~~First person model (press f6 to disable the mod)~~ not in 1.20.6 - Sodium - other performance mods - And other mods I've carefully made this modpack over the course of a month and used it **A LOT** myself (more than 25h ingame time!), which is why i hope you'll download and enjoy it! ## Also feel free to check out Trailer Recreation++ [>HERE<](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailer-recreation++)
